goal: Fix Dogfood #5 findings 1, 2, and 3: tabs.current consistency, phantom video artifacts, and fill post-action evidence

summary.title: Fix Dogfood #5 tabs, video artifacts, and fill state
summary.what: Fixed the three requested Dogfood #5 findings: tabs.current now reports the current tab index; video-stop/video-status filter missing reported artifacts before counting or persisting lastFiles; fill now gets a post-action snapshot like check/uncheck/press.
summary.why: The fresh SauceDemo dogfood showed agents still needed extra verification for fill, tab metadata contradicted tab_rows after spawn/close flows, and video output could point at non-existent evidence. These were small output-shape bugs in otherwise working flows.
summary.user_goal: Fix Dogfood #5 findings 1, 2, and 3: tabs.current consistency, phantom video artifacts, and fill post-action evidence

decisions.chose: Reuse the existing post-action snapshot path instead of inventing a fill-specific value extractor.
Compute tabs.current from the parsed row with current:true, preserving tab_rows as the source of truth.
Filter upstream-reported video artifacts through filesystem existence checks before rendering output or saving lastFiles.

rejected.reason: A post-action snapshot already proves visible page state and keeps the diff smaller.
The finding was specifically that missing files were overstated as available evidence.

review_notes: Validation passed: npm run typecheck; npm run test (300 tests); npm run test:prop (52 property tests); npm run build; npm run check:skill.

Live smoke passed after rebuild: fill returned snapshot.file with an existing cache file; tab-list/tab-close reported tabs.current: 0 consistently; video-stop/status reported one real WebM and no phantom file.

behavioral_changes: fill returns a post-action snapshot file instead of only result: {}.
tabs.current now reports current tab index, including 0 for the first tab.
video artifact outputs and sidecar lastFiles no longer count missing files as available artifacts.
